title: Move score-level list padding into background slot
description: For score-level procedure/evaluation replacement panels, move standard p-3 spacing into the bg-background slot and remove the oversized outer px-4/pb-4 wrapper. Version-scoped tabs should keep their current spacing.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Moved score-level replacement panel spacing into the bg-background slot: slot mode now uses outer h-full with no px-4/pb-4 wrapper and inner min-h-full bg-background p-3. Version-scoped lists keep the existing px-4/pb-4 spacing. Focused tests and dashboard typecheck pass.
